title: K* Verification: Machine-verified companion for 'Provable measurement design for quantum state tomography from Hamming-scheme spectral theory'
description: Complete machine-verification suite for the companion manuscript submission. Includes: (1) Lean 4 formal proofs of all 11 theorems (0 sorry, max 2 propositional axioms), (2) the universal-n airtightness extension (Phases A-G), (3) machine-generated axiom report and verification manifest, (4) Jupyter demo notebook reproducing every combinatorial identity, (5) 8-tier Python verification suite, and (6) pre-built Docker container. See VERIFICATION.md for the tiered reviewer onramp.
notes: Release tagged at the companion manuscript submission. Contains the exact Lean toolchain pin (see lean4/lean-toolchain), the generated verification_manifest.json snapshotting git SHA + axiom report, and the Dockerfile.lean4 recipe for fully reproducible verification. Regenerate all artifacts via `python lean4/scripts/generate_all.py`. The related K* Verification article DOI will be added to related_identifiers in the post-acceptance v1.0.1 release.
